bonuses.2: Increases Power Gauge Acquisition Rate by 20%.
bonuses.4: At the start of battle, charges the Power Gauge by 50%. Additionally increases the team's Power Gauge Acquisition Rate by 20%.

bonuses.2: Increases the user's Basic Attack damage by 18%.
bonuses.4: Increases Core Attack damage by 18%. When Core Attacks hit an enemy, charges the Core Gauge by 60.

bonuses.2: Increases the user's Attack by 5%.
bonuses.4: When attacking enemies, ignores 15% of the target's Defense.

bonuses.2: Increases Ultimate Skill damage by 25%.
bonuses.4: Decreases the Ultimate Skill cooldown by 40%.

bonuses.2: The user's HP increases by 8%.
bonuses.4: Reduces the user's Attack by 8%, but increases all team members' Attack by 8%.

bonuses.2: The Shield effects of the user increase by 30%.
bonuses.4: When a team member activates a Shield, increases damage dealt by 10% for 10 second(s).

bonuses.2: The user's damage dealt to enemies in the Break state increases by 15%.
bonuses.4: The Break effect increases by 30%. When attacking enemies that are weak to the element, increases damage by 30%.

bonuses.2: The user's Critical Hit Rate increases by 8%.
bonuses.4: The user's Critical Hit damage increases by 32%.

bonuses.2: The user's HP increases by 8%.
bonuses.4: Increases healing given by 8%. The team member with the highest Total Power receives an 8% damage increase.

bonuses.2: Increases the user's Attack and Defense by 4%.
bonuses.4: When the user's attacks hit, their Attack and Defense increases by 3% for 6 second(s). Can be stacked up to 5 times.

bonuses.2: The user's Critical Hit Rate increases by 8%.
bonuses.4: The user's Critical Hit damage increases by 32%.

bonuses.2: Increases the user's Defense by 8%.
bonuses.4: When using an Ultimate Skill, Defense increases by 5% (stacks up to 5 times). Reduces Ultimate Skill damage received once.

bonuses.2: Increases Skill MP Consumption Rate by 20%, but increases the user's damage dealt by 5%.
bonuses.4: Increases the user's damage dealt by 18%. Decreases Basic Skill cooldown by 18%.

bonuses.2: When tagging out, increases the user and their team members' Attack by 12% for 10 second(s).
bonuses.4: The Attack boost increases to 28% and the duration increases to 15 second(s).

bonuses.2: When landing a Critical Hit, the user has a 25% chance to increase Attack by 0.8%.
bonuses.4: The activation rate becomes 50% and the Attack increase rises to 1.6%.

bonuses.2: When the user has 50% HP or less, their damage dealt increases by 15%.
bonuses.4: The HP threshold changes to 70% and the damage boost rises to 30%.

bonuses.2: When attacking enemies with 40% or less HP, increases the user's damage dealt by 8%.
bonuses.4: The HP threshold changes to 70% and the damage increase rises to 20%.

bonuses.2: Increases the user's Attack by 5% for 4 second(s) when landing a Critical Hit.
bonuses.4: The Attack boost can stack up to 4 instances.

bonuses.2: When landing a Critical Hit, the user has a 25% chance to increase Attack by 0.8%.
bonuses.4: The activation rate becomes 50% and the Attack increase rises to 1.6%.

bonuses.2: When using QTE/Support/Ultimate Skills, elemental weakness damage increases by 5% for the team.
bonuses.4: The duration extends to 60 second(s) and the maximum stack count becomes 3.

bonuses.2: When the user has 70% or more of their MP, their damage dealt increases by 30%.
bonuses.4: The damage boost increases to 60% at 40% MP or higher.

bonuses.2: The damage of user skills with the Break effect increases by 30%.
bonuses.4: The skill damage increase rises to 60%.

bonuses.2: When the user or a team member tags in, it increases their Attack by 12%.
bonuses.4: The Attack boost increases to 28% for 15 second(s).

bonuses.2: When tagging out, applies the [Blessing] effect to the user and their team members. Increases damage dealt by 8%.
bonuses.4: [Blessing] becomes [Enhanced Blessing]. Duration and effect are enhanced.
bonuses.8: [Enhanced Blessing] becomes Burning Blessing. Further increases damage dealt.

bonuses.2: When hitting with a Break damage attack, applies the [Greed] effect. Increases Critical Hit Rate by 1% (stacks up to 10 times).
bonuses.4: When [Greed] stacks 10 times, it becomes [Enhanced Greed].
bonuses.8: Attacking enemies at their elemental weakness increases the [Break] effect by 30%. [Enhanced Greed] becomes Burning Greed.

bonuses.2: Applies the [Curse] effect: damage taken increases by 20%, but damage dealt increases by 10% and by an additional 0.1% every 1 second(s) (stacks up to 100 times).
bonuses.4: Applies the [Rescue] effect: if HP falls to 25% or less, recovers 25% HP. Activates once per dungeon.
bonuses.8: [Curse] becomes [Burning Curse]: damage dealt increases by 30% and by an additional 0.2% every 1 second(s) (stacks up to 100 times).

bonuses.2: When the user uses their Ultimate Skill, grants the [Wish] effect to the user and team. [Wish]: +8% Attack. Cooldown: 25s.
bonuses.4: [Wish] becomes [Enhanced Wish]: triggers on Ultimate or Support Skill. +10% Attack and Defense, +0.2% HP recovery/s. Duration: 10s. Cooldown: 25s.
bonuses.8: Skill MP Consumption Rate +20%, but Basic Skill cooldown -10%. [Enhanced Wish] becomes Chaotic Wish: triggers on Ultimate, Support, or Core Attack. +15% Attack and Defense, +0.2% HP recovery/s. Duration: 20s. Cooldown: 25s.

bonuses.2: When a Break damage attack hits, applies the [Desire] effect: +0.5% elemental damage per stack (max 20). Cooldown: 1.5s. Duration: Permanent.
bonuses.4: At 20 stacks, [Desire] becomes [Enhanced Desire]: +30% Break skill damage, +20% elemental damage for user and team. Duration: Permanent.
bonuses.8: Attacking enemies at their elemental weakness increases Break by 30%. [Enhanced Desire] becomes Chaotic Desire: +50% Break skill damage, +40% elemental damage for user and team.

bonuses.2: Using a skill grants the [Infamy] effect: +1.5% Basic Skill damage per stack (max 20), +1% damage taken per stack (max 20).
bonuses.4: [Infamy] becomes [Enhanced Infamy]: +2.5% Basic Skill damage per stack (max 20). Basic Skill use recovers 5% MP. Cooldown: 30s.
bonuses.8: In Teamfight mode, damage dealt +40%. At 10 [Enhanced Infamy] stacks, becomes Chaotic Infamy: +100% Basic and Ultimate Skill damage, removes damage taken penalty.

bonuses.4: Applies the [Arrogance] effect. [Arrogance]: Increases the damage of skills with the [Break] effect by 30%. When an attack that deals Break damage hits, the user and their team members' Critical Hit damage increases by 15% (Cooldown: 40s). Duration: 40s.
bonuses.8: Increases [Break] effectiveness by 30%. Enhances [Arrogance] to [Brilliant Arrogance]. [Brilliant Arrogance]: Increases the damage of skills with the [Break] effect by 50%. When an attack that deals Break damage hits, Critical Hit damage increases by 25% for user and team (Cooldown: 40s). Duration: 40s. When [Sung Jinwoo] or a [Breaker] equips this, Critical Hit damage increases by 40%. When [Sung Jinwoo] or a [Breaker] uses their Ultimate Skill, Critical Hit Rate increases by 15% for user and team (Cooldown: 60s). Duration: 60s. [Arrogance] cannot be activated.

bonuses.4: Applies the [Obession] effect. [Obession]: Increases the user and team members' Overload damage by 15%. Increases Basic Skill and Ultimate Skill damage by 25% when successfully inflicting Overload damage (Cooldown: 20s). Duration: 20s.
bonuses.8: Enhances [Obession] to [Burning Obession]. [Burning Obession]: Increases the user and team members' Overload damage by 30%. Increases Basic Skill and Ultimate Skill damage by 40% when successfully inflicting Overload damage (Cooldown: 20s). Duration: 20s. When [Sung Jinwoo] or an [Elemental Stacker] equips this, Overload damage increases by 50% and Elemental Weakness damage by 20%. [Obession] cannot be activated.

bonuses.4: Applies [Fortification] when a Basic Skill or Ultimate Skill hits. [Fortification]: Increases user and team members' Elemental Weakness damage by 15% (Cooldown: 45s). Duration: 45s. Applies [Brilliant Light] when the user tags out or uses an Ultimate Skill. [Brilliant Light]: Increases user and team members' damage dealt by 10% (Cooldown: 20s). Duration: 20s.
bonuses.8: Enhances [Fortification] to [Iron Body] and [Brilliant Light] to [Glory]. [Iron Body]: Increases Elemental Weakness damage by 25% for user and team (Cooldown: 45s). Duration: 45s. [Glory]: Increases damage dealt by 20% for user and team (Cooldown: 20s), restores 10% MP (Cooldown: 20s). Duration: 20s. When [Sung Jinwoo] or a [Supporter] equips this, Basic Skill damage increases by 30% and Attack/Defense/HP by 15%. When [Sung Jinwoo] or a [Supporter] uses their Ultimate Skill, recovers 0.25% HP every 1s (Cooldown: 30s). Duration: 16s. [Fortification] and [Brilliant Light] cannot be activated.

bonuses.4: Applies the [Poison] effect. [Poison]: Increases Basic Skill damage by 20%. Increases Attack and Defense by 1% every 1s (stacking up to 30 times). Duration: Permanent.
bonuses.8: Enhances [Poison] to [Blue Poison]. [Blue Poison]: Increases Defense Penetration by 20%. Increases Basic Skill damage by 30%. Increases Attack and Defense by 2.5% every 1s (stacks up to 30 times). Duration: Permanent. When [Sung Jinwoo] or a [Striker] equips this, damage dealt increases by 50%. [Poison] cannot be activated.
